Headline: #172 U. of Chicago/Kenwood Temporary Reroute near 53rd/ Woodlawn
ShortDescription: #172 U. of Chicago/Kenwood buses temporarily rerouted due to street blockage near 53rd/ Woodlawn.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#172 U. of Chicago/Kenwood buses temporarily rerouted due to street blockage near 53rd/ Woodlawn.

Northbound buses will operate via 53rd, Cornell and Hyde Park over the normal route.

Southbound buses will operate via Hyde Park, Lake Park, 53rd and Ellis over the normal route.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #22 Clark and #152 Addison Temporary Reroute near Clark/Addison
ShortDescription: 22 Clark and 152 Addison buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to street blockage near Clark/Addison.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#22 Clark and #152 Addison buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to street blockage near Clark/Addison.

#22 Clark buses will operate via Clark, Racine, Belmont, then resume their normal route on Clark.

#152 Addison buses will operate via Addison, Racine, Belmont, Halsted, then resume their normal route on Addison.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #95 95th, #108 Halsted/95th and #112 Vincennes/111th Temporary Reroute near 95th/Eggleston
ShortDescription: #95 95th, #108 Halsted/95th and #112 Vincennes/111th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to street blockage near 95th/Eggleston.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#95 95th, #108 Halsted/95th and #112 Vincennes/111th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to street blockage near 95th/Eggleston.

#95 95th buses will be rerouted in both directions via 95th, Halsted, 87th, Lafayette, 95th and over regular route.

#108 Halsted/95th and #112 Vincennes/111th buses will be rerouted in both directions via Halsted, 87th, Lafayette, 95th and over regular route.

Allow extra travel time.
